#### Instructions

* Send an invite to your indexer to telegramircrr@protonmail.com
* Replace `${INDEXER_ENDPOINT}` with your indexer endpoint (E.G. `myindexer.tld`, `indexer.domain.tld`)

#### Requirements

* [ ] I have sent an invite for the indexer to telegramircrr@protonmail.com
* Indexer endpoint: `${INDEXER_ENDPOINT}`
